Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BLUE BOTTLE COFFEE, LLC'S Motion To Dismiss Action Because Plaintiff Is Not Prepared To Proceed With Trial is Off calendar as moot. Action dismissed pursuant to joint stipulation of parties lodged for filing 11/6/20.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
